response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video content. 00:00-04:17 is instrumental background music. 2. Identified vocal song 'Draw.' starting at 04:17 via visual clues (artist/song metadata) and confirmed via web search for 'Raora Panthera Draw. original song'. 3. Retrieved lyrics and performed translation for 'Draw.'. 4. Structured the output into two scenes based on the transition to vocal music.
response.global_summary: The video is a special event introduction for Raora Panthera's birthday (May 11, 2028). It features an instrumental background music loop for most of the video, followed by the vocal original song 'Draw.' by Raora Panthera.

scenes.description: The video opens with a static title screen for 'Where Emotions Bloom - Raora Panthera Birthday'. An instrumental background track plays throughout this segment.

The original song 'Draw.' begins as the animation shifts to the performer sitting at her desk, followed by a zoom into a paper cut-out style sequence. Vocal music plays for the remainder of the video.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The warmth of a dream
And the scent of paint on my fingertips
On the damp canvas
Colors I don't know yet are breathing
All the pieces I picked up
Unravel in my own chest
“It’s okay,” I whisper softly
Saying it back to myself
There's no need to hide
My hesitation or my trembling
Every one of these lines
Leads to me
I’m drawing out my true colors
Even the blurred outlines
Faint, fragile, and glittering
Are taking shape
On the remnant of the dawn
I layer the colors I've gathered
Draw it slow, draw it true
Draw it slow, draw it true
In the dream-like state of dawn
An answer in the margins of a doze
Colors bloom on the white page
Drawing out the living scenery
All the colors I held back
Start to gather in the hush
“It’s all right,” the first light tells me
Sending warmth into my heart
There's no need to hide
My wishes or my hopes
Look, I'm drawing
My true self as it is
At last, hold my true colors
Even the loosened outlines
Softly, forever, overlapping
They become my shape
In the quiet beginning
Holding the awakened colors
I’m drawing out my true colors
Even the blurred outlines
Faint, fragile, and glittering
Are taking shape
On the remnant of the dawn
I draw with the colors I've gathered
Draw it slow, draw it true
Ah-ah-ah-ah-ah
(la, la, la,
la, la, la
la, la, la, la, la, la, la)
Ah-ah-ah-ah-ah
Draw it slow, draw it true
The warmth of a dream
And the scent of paint on my fingertips
Beyond the ordinary morning
Colors I don't know yet are overflowing,
